name: root chamber under the stump
description: I'm in a root chamber under the stump
hints: There is a treasure here and a way to go deeper. Look around carefully.
The pot of rubies is a treasure - take it back to the stump (room 3). The dark hole leads further underground.
GET RUBIES then GO HOLE to continue deeper into the underground. Make sure you have a light source before going further.
notes: Contains the first treasure (pot of rubies) and a dark hole leading deeper underground to room 5. Located directly below the treasure stump (room 3).
